assemblyInfo.description: Genome Reference Consortium Human Build 38 patch release 14 (GRCh38.p14)

bioprojects.title: The Human Genome Project, currently maintained by the Genome Reference Consortium (GRC)

assemblyInfo.comments:
Assembly Name: GRCh38.p14 Primary Assembly
The DNA sequence is composed of genomic sequence, primarily finished clones that were sequenced as part of the Human Genome Project. PCR products and WGS shotgun sequence have been added where necessary to fill gaps or correct errors. All such additions are manually curated by GRC staff. For more information see: https://genomereference.org

pairedAssembly.manualDiff: RefSeq dropped two scaffolds that are predominantly rodent or bacterial in origin (KI270752.1/NT_187507.1 and KI270825.1/NT_187580.1), and dropped two unlocalized scaffolds that are now thought to be redundant with assembled chromosome sequence (KI270721.1/NT_187376.1 and KI270734.1/NT_187389.1)
pairedAssembly.differences: Removed 4 unlocalized and unplaced scaffolds; RefSeq dropped two scaffolds that are predominantly rodent or bacterial in origin (KI270752.1/NT_187507.1 and KI270825.1/NT_187580.1), and dropped two unlocalized scaffolds that are now thought to be redundant with assembled chromosome sequence (KI270721.1/NT_187376.1 and KI270734.1/NT_187389.1)

annotationInfo.name: GCF_000001405.40-RS_2025_08
annotationInfo.method: Best-placed RefSeq; Gnomon; RefSeqFE; cmsearch; tRNAscan-SE
